description:
This quiz tests foundational SQL querying abilities, challenging developers to write raw queries without relying on ORM abstractions. It targets a beginner-to-intermediate difficulty level and uses a casual, encouraging tone to help programmers confidently refresh their database skills.
Topics: SQL Fundamentals, Raw Database Querying, ORM Independence, Data Retrieval
Audience: Software developers and backend engineers who use ORMs and want to validate or improve their direct SQL proficiency
